name: Creamy Lemonade Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages jello vanilla instant pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cold milk into a large bowl.
2. Add both Jell-O pudding mixes and whisk until combined for 30 seconds.
3. Gradually add the thawed lemonade and whisk again for another 30 seconds, or until thickened.
4. Stir in the Cool Whip until well mixed.
5. Spoon the filling into the prepared graham cracker crust.
6. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or until set.
7. Garnish with lemon slices before serving.
